name: Budget Barbecues
recipeIngredient: 2 cups turkey light meat, skinless, cooked and cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat.
2. Add onions and cook until tender.
3. Stir in ketchup, brown sugar, water, white vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, dry mustard, chili powder, and paprika. Bring to a boil.
4. Add sauerkraut. Cover and reduce heat. Simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add turkey. Continue simmering, uncovered, until the turkey is heated through and the sauce has thickened.
